response.overview: The Hockey Hall of Fame is excited to debut its latest feature film, Little Big Shot.  This 17-minute cinematic experience delivers an imaginative and action-packed storyline: a group of teenagers sneaks into the Hall of Fame after hours, only to discover that legendary Hall of Famers and historic artifacts come to life — turning their mischievous adventure into an unforgettable showdown.  Little Big Shot offers a unique blend of computer-generated animation and hockey history, making it a must-see for fans of all ages. Visitors can immerse themselves in this thrilling tale while exploring the iconic exhibits of the Hockey Hall of Fame.
response.title: Little Big Shot
